name: vibe-rig
description: Requirement planning, local task control, and accepted-work insights for VibeRig workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Turn requirements into local execution plans.
interface.longDescription: VibeRig helps Codex turn ambiguous requirements into reviewable requirement docs, acceptance criteria, task graphs, Linear child issue drafts, worktree execution plans, and post-acceptance retrospectives with conservative learning candidates.
defaultPrompt: Split this spec into child tasks
